title: Pro-forma Invoice Estimates
summaryBody: Adding a new estimate type of “pro-forma invoice” allows our customers to create and send pro-formas, and convert to real Invoices when ready
detailBody: Adding a new estimate type of “pro-forma invoice” allows our customers to create and send pro-formas, and convert to real Invoices when ready
